description:
Post-finalization spec revision 2026-06-05 (bl-2e26 §12/§13/§16 tracker parts). Amends landed bl-4522 ('§12/§13 tracker plugin: remote sync/push, prime, trail pointer', commit 9124d4d). SUPERSEDES the in-progress bl-02c3 ('Tracker adopt-into-empty: fresh-clone materialization / close the 2-hop trail loop') — its 2-hop-trail premise is dissolved; let bl-02c3 land, then this corrects.

WHY: federation is now many landings naming ONE shared store branch (tasks_branch), backed by a common remote. No transitive trail, no origin->central auto-discovery, no zero-touch onboarding (onboarding = explicit 'bl install --from <center>', the consent boundary).

WHAT (src/bin tracker plugin):
- The tracker syncs the STORE branch (tasks_branch) with its configured remote ONLY: sync/pre = git fetch + ff-only (non-ff = contention, non-zero exit); present->ff/adopt, absent->bootstrap(create+push). prime resolves the remote (--remote > --center > XDG > origin) for tasks_branch.
- Pointer is the store's REMOTE (tracker territory), NOT a transitive next: chain. Drop trail-walk handling and the origin->central discovery.
- --stealth = store stays local (no remote).
- doctor hook: audit the tasks_branch remote reachable + its clone healthy / stale-beyond-TTL (TTL is tracker's own territory).
title: Greenfield tracker: sync tasks_branch<->remote (ff-only/union); store-remote config, not transitive next: pointer
